name: Toast
description: Toast is used to display messages in an overlay.

props.name: group
props.description: Unique identifier of a message group.

props.name: position
props.description: Position of the toast in viewport.

props.name: baseZIndex
props.description: Base zIndex value to use in layering.

props.name: breakpoints
props.description: Object literal to define styles per screen size.

props.name: closeIcon
props.description: Icon to display in the toast close button.

props.name: infoIcon
props.description: Icon to display in the toast with info severity.

props.name: warnIcon
props.description: Icon to display in the toast with warn severity.

props.name: errorIcon
props.description: Icon to display in the toast with error severity.

props.name: successIcon
props.description: Icon to display in the toast with success severity.

props.name: closeButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the HTMLButtonElement to the close button.

props.name: onMouseEnter
props.description: Used to specify a callback function to be run when the mouseenter event is fired on the message component.

props.name: onMouseLeave
props.description: Used to specify a callback function to be run when the mouseleave event is fired on the message component.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Used to specify a callback function to be run when the click event is fired on the message component.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: close
events.description: Callback to invoke when the toast is closed.

events.name: life-end
events.description: Callback to invoke when the toast's timeout is over.

slots.name: message
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Message of the component */ message: any; }): VNode[]

slots.name: icon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the message icon */ class: any; }): VNode[]

slots.name: messageicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the icon */ class: any; }): VNode[]

slots.name: closeicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the close icon */ class: any; }): VNode[]

slots.name: container
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Message of the component */ message: any; /** * Close sidebar function. */ closeCallback: () => void; }): VNode[]
